title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Judge Rules 7-Foot C Charles Bediako No Longer Eligible To Play for Alabama
items.description: Alabama basketball player Charles Bediako’s motion for a preliminary injunction has been denied, ending his collegiate eligibility.

items.title: No. 9 Kansas Beats Top-Ranked And Previously Unbeaten Arizona 82-78
items.description: Flory Bidunga had a double-double and No. 9 Kansas defeated top-ranked and previously unbeaten Arizona 82-78 on Monday night.

items.title: 2026 NFL Coaching/GM Tracker: Raiders Officially Hire Klint Kubiak as HC
items.description: The coaching carousel for the 2026 offseason continues to churn. Here are the latest news and rumors from around the NFL!

items.title: St. John's Fends Off Xavier In Overtime, Extending Win Streak to 10 Games
items.description: No. 17 St. John's outlasted Xavier on Monday night, 87-82, at Madison Square Garden for its 10th consecutive victory.

items.title: Men's College Basketball 2025-26 Undefeated Teams Tracker: Arizona Goes Down
items.description: Only one men's college basketball team remains undefeated in the 2025-2026 season.

items.title: What this NBA trade deadline revealed: Teams are finding new ways to tank
items.description: Much to the irritation of some league insiders, the trade deadline was more than just a flurry of moves.

items.title: Luka hasn't made the Lakers a title contender, yet: Here's what we've seen in 365 days
items.description: Let's revisit the first 365 days of the Luka Doncic era in Los Angeles and examine how the Lakers can return to championship contention.

items.title: Liverpool at a crossroads: Where it has gone wrong for Slot since Premier League title
items.description: It's been a rough season for Arne Slot and Liverpool -- but is it already too late for them to turn the tide?

items.title: Ranked: The top 25 manager jobs in soccer, from best to worst
items.description: Most of soccer's top coaching jobs will be vacant in the next year or so. Let's rank which jobs are the most -- and least -- attractive, from clubs to...

items.title: Next season already? Our Way-Too-Early NFL Power Rankings stack all 32 teams for 2026
items.description: After the conclusion of the 2025 NFL season, how do all 32 teams stack up for 2026?
